textByHash.e1b10f2064bc8b3983aaa3b753313ab298f46f6c: I vow upon the blood of my fallen kin that I shall not set foot in that godforsaken village till I have slain the Shaikahan.
textByHash.4e54e75ed459105144fc2c10d49f3f29322c48a5: No! Your pitiful whining tires me. Now let me prepare.
textByHash.e3ad86c4450c63841e1d19a7641b3c3381eeb939: A source of indescribable evil. A beast more foul than your dreams could imagine. It hunts the jungle for anything foolish enough to cross its path.
textByHash.e5140f909b1a5ed407e7edfc90d2b86f1553d0ae: It stands a full man's length in height. Its fore claws are sharp enough to rip through metal. In its eyes glow the embers of death.
textByHash.14b2988b0b16e893dfbe2b45e7562b14c6ff2bdb: Since before I was born, stranger. It is my destiny.
textByHash.341ac724b6271f8c3188a2c8ca1a85673da6a519: When the gods bless me with success. You may join me on my next hunt, but you may not take part.
textByHash.e911a90d737667a96da0ea45236f68f9b5babdeb: Shaikhan is at present far too agile for me!
textByHash.30740ba110762ca5c8d4dd6cc0c486ff5ea364e9: I cannot do enough damage with this spear...
textByHash.603d71a9fe49f60f2cb8be36cc94c7e0499886bd: ... and it seems to be healing too quickly!
textByHash.891f3df10f9ae67631a52837b0bf80b9eda07772: You offer to kill the beast for me? Stop this nonsense, lest I kill you first. It is I who must avenge the death of my kin.
textByHash.4b4a02eaaa833a4395c56ef914348ca3570ec48f: Very well, but you must not interfere.
textByHash.ea11f1709ced3288ece1b690fa72f5fd52192c1a: I'm not going to skin that! In the jungle, we help only those who help us.
textByHash.0d02b16c1f7774e775c310f219473027b5754676: I am beginning to match Shaikahan's agility!
textByHash.89c805e25edcb40f0806ef227ca68a7f97e21f28: Thank you Bwana. Now I must prepare for my next hunt.
textByHash.67e257c64cfeb13e418c23835048a3a44ab28f53: ... but it seems to be healing too quickly!
textByHash.275722e8f2377ca16be59d6ceee07b5734ad35f6: I feel much more agile, but I am not sure whether I can match the Shaikahan...
textByHash.b18f6b96976490a20c520995e9f13f5059b1caac: I feel agile enough to finally match the Shaikahan!
textByHash.1eca20a3952fc71724ffe53f220ff9a8d81c4988: I have matched the Shaikahan in agility! He can no longer avoid my strikes!
textByHash.d116ee14734ef290a0a4e78a07729654b06371fb: ... and it does seem quite sick! Perhaps another poison would be more effective?
textByHash.aa88e87248dedc9a47058526324ba834f8820c75: I did it! I, Tamayu, first son of Timfraku, did slay the Shaikahan!
textByHash.70eaccf5a334bc45927d068fed42947c533690a0: The deaths of my kin have been avenged. You are my witness.
textByHash.158d12f425926bf1e6b1fb6c383a84e6e6df979e: Yes. Go on ahead without me. I have further matters to attend to here.
textByHash.4e69704535d137a97ba52ce05777d4d35108b373: I will meet you in the village once you have helped my brothers and spoken to my father.
textByHash.7f4da6f762e38da64e70b62fb62c27112c5e8525: Let me guess - you want me to skin that monkey. Very well: I shall, since you have assisted me.
textByHash.0835cee36d94c46864366b4b1b8748a9715618fe: Welcome back to Tai Bwo Wannai, stranger.
textByHash.c2ae65e3ca711a5a2d36dc6dfd60eedbd4ef8d52: And neither do we, thanks to you. My father has requested I give you something of value.
textByHash.bb49bd9cbacbbb2979fb132b94b09a76a101a22a: I have not much of worth to give, apart from my fighting technique.
textByHash.c13e8f1b7bcd7971034da536b8ec23698c15dec7: This is the one thing I can give. My family have honoured me with this spear. But the honour is truly yours.
textByHash.e90e0bdfdf6a36a244668e1863d8b82cea55b558: Using your new found poison I have been creating spears. Would you like to buy some?
textByHash.e163ec519287e9f336b693568bbc6e1814e5a13b: Get out of my way! Argh! I'm hunting!
textByHash.6bcb4ac8e7a1ac42accf4d0fca554088604cad9d: Move, lest I slay not the beast but you!
